fml.menu.mods.info.description.hudtips: Add conditional HUD hints to modpacks via JSON config — auto-displays tips when holding items, looking at blocks, or pressing keys. Supports guide mode, AND/OR trigger combos, and adaptive scaling.
hudtips.configuration.title: HUD Tips Config
hudtips.configuration.enabled.tooltip: Master switch to enable/disable the mod.
hudtips.configuration.scaleWithGui.toolt: Enable adaptive text sizing based on GUI scale and resolution.
hudtips.configuration.guiScaleComp.toolt: GUI scale compensation strength. 0 = follow GUI, 100 = full.
hudtips.configuration.itemHintPosition.t: Default screen position for item-driven hints. Options: bottom_left, bottom_right, top_left, top_right, above_item.
hudtips.configuration.globalSeenState.to: When enabled, tutorial hint completion is shared across all saves. Completed tutorials won't reappear in other saves.
hudtips.reset_hint: Reset %s seen hint(s) for held item
